title: centrosema teresae
intro: Centrosema teresae is a type of legume plant commonly known as the "sensitive plant" due to its unique ability to fold its leaves when touched. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of Centrosema teresae include its potential in reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Centrosema teresae are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
